g.title: MainExecutionFlow
g.text: Jumpa Verse - Complete Runtime Execution Flow From main.cpp

g.title: main
g.text: Creates SDL pointers, player, vectors, Score, GameOver

g.title: player_ctor
g.text: player(int sx=150, int sy=100, int sw=0, int sh=0)

g.title: init
g.text: Initializes SDL video, TTF, IMG, display size, window, renderer

g.title: reset_lambda
g.text: Recreates player, resets camera, vectors, score, gameOver

g.title: ground_generator
g.text: Creates first platform with random y/w/h

g.title: random_ground_boot
g.text: Adds next platform and calls trapTriangle()

g.title: menu_loop
g.text: Blocks gameplay until menuScreen returns true

g.title: open_login
g.text: Calls runLoginScreen and sets exitb on quit

g.title: login_run
g.text: Text input, validate login, optional register

g.title: physics
g.text: Jump, gravity, dash/back movement, platform landing collision

g.title: hit_trap
g.text: Builds visible trap hitbox and SDL_HasIntersection

g.title: save_score
g.text: Append score.csv and update player.csv row

g.title: go_screen
g.text: Nested event/render loop until Try Again/Menu/Quit

g.title: generate_more
g.text: while last platform is near viewport

g.title: free_ground
g.text: Erase platforms fully left of screen

g.title: free_trap
g.text: Erase traps far left of screen

g.title: camera_move
g.text: Moves platform geometry and trap x positions

g.title: score_render
g.text: Score::render creates text textures, draws score box
